scripts.predev:local: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='api/local.settings.json';if(!fs.existsSync(p)){fs.copyFileSync(p+'.example',p);console.log('[bootstrap] created '+p+' from example - edit it if you need to override values');}"
scripts.dev:swa: node ./scripts/prep-local-swa-config.js && wait-on tcp:4281 tcp:10002 && node ./scripts/init-azurite-tables.js && swa start http://localhost:4281 --api-location api --swa-config-location .swa-local
